content_body:
A little taste of Hawaii right here in Blue Ridge! With fresh ingredients every single day, Poké Jon's crafts flavorful poké bowls where every bite is a new discovery. This is the perfect lunch spot while you shop in downtown Blue Ridge. 

After dark, Poké Jon's turns into Sake Jon's, a hip experience bursting with inventive cocktails, karaoke, an occasional DJ, and much more. This Blue Ridge tik-easy will leave a lasting imprint on your North GA vacation!
title: Poké Jon's
